result.summary: Mapped Cafe24’s public developer integration surface: 4 HTTP APIs (Admin, Front, D.Collection, Analytics) and 2 MCP servers (Mall and Catalog); no public GraphQL API or CLI found.

cafe24_oauth_app.label: Cafe24 app OAuth client (client ID/secret)
cafe24_oauth_app.setup: Sign in to [Cafe24 Developers](https://developers.cafe24.com/) and create a general app from [App creation](https://developers.cafe24.com/app/front/app/develop/createapps). The app creation/OAuth docs under [General app development](https://developers.cafe24.com/app/front/app/develop) describe obtaining the app's `client_id` and `client_secret`, then using Cafe24's OAuth flow to get access and refresh tokens for each mall.

cafe24_dcollection_basic.label: D.Collection API client ID and client secret
cafe24_dcollection_basic.setup: Use of D.Collection API is limited to Cafe24-approved partners. The docs at [D.Collection API](https://developers.cafe24.com/docs/en/api/dcollection/) show Basic authentication with `client_id` and `client_secret`. Obtain partner approval and the issued client credentials through Cafe24's D.Collection partner program pages under [D.Collection](https://developers.cafe24.com/data/front/dcollection).

variables.name: mallid
variables.description: Mall/store identifier used in the subdomain, shown in examples as `{mallid}`.

variables.name: mall_id
variables.description: Mall/store identifier used in the MCP endpoint subdomain.
